title: Volume measurement
hint: Start measuring by clicking in the scene to place your first point.
snappingDisablePrompt: Press and hold the Ctrl key to temporarily disable snapping.
snappingDisablePromptAlternate: Hold the Ctrl key to temporarily disable snapping.
unsupported: 3D volume measurement is only supported in SceneView.
errorInsufficientData: Adjust the view to load enough detail for an accurate measurement.
errorPerimeterTooLarge: The perimeter of the volume measurement area is too large.
errorUnsupportedCoordinateSystem: The coordinate system of the view is not supported for volume measurement.
errorUnsupportedLayerTransparency: The volume measurement analysis does not support transparent layers.
